Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.label: Albatross BII
Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.description:
A sturdy two-seat biplane used for reconnaissance, artillery spotting, and pilot training during the early years of the First World War. Reliable and easy to handle, it helped establish aircraft as valuable tools for battlefield observation.

Less obvious on caravans than other early planes.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Pilot x1, Passenger x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
